title: Smartworks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Smartworks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Smartworks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Smartworks:
Smartworks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartworks!
